provider_approval_type: human trafficking training approved by the Office of the Attorney General (OAG)
applicable_to: commercial lodging establishments of 10 or more rooms
all lodging establishments in the State of Texas regardless of size
recordkeeping_requirements: maintain sufficient records to show compliance with Section 114.0051, Texas Business and Commerce Code

law_references.code_section: Section 114.0051, Texas Business and Commerce Code

harbor_alliance_actions: evaluate additional measures based on feedback
risks_or_constraints: state-controlled training requirement may increase operational costs
recordkeeping requirements could be burdensome for small establishments
needs_review: additional source URLs should be identified
